mapper.select:
SELECT tb_vlt_crd_idx AS idx, tb_vlt_crd_uuid AS uuid, ttl, lgn_id AS lgnId, pwd, memo, vlt_cat_idx AS vltCatIdx, created_by AS createdBy, updated_by AS updatedBy, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, del_at AS delAt FROM tb_vlt_crd WHERE created_by = #{createdBy} AND del_at IS NULL
AND vlt_cat_idx = ( SELECT tb_vlt_cat_idx FROM tb_vlt_cat WHERE tb_vlt_cat_uuid = CAST(#{categoryUuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL )
AND ( ttl LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(memo, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT tb_vlt_crd_idx AS idx, tb_vlt_crd_uuid AS uuid, ttl, lgn_id AS lgnId, pwd, memo, vlt_cat_idx AS vltCatIdx, created_by AS createdBy, updated_by AS updatedBy, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, del_at AS delAt FROM tb_vlt_crd WHERE tb_vlt_crd_idx = #{idx} AND del_at IS NULL

SELECT tb_vlt_crd_idx AS idx, tb_vlt_crd_uuid AS uuid, ttl, lgn_id AS lgnId, pwd, memo, vlt_cat_idx AS vltCatIdx, created_by AS createdBy, updated_by AS updatedBy, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, del_at AS delAt FROM tb_vlt_crd WHERE tb_vlt_crd_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND created_by = #{createdBy} AND del_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_vlt_crd ( ttl, lgn_id, pwd, memo, vlt_cat_idx, created_by ) VALUES ( #{ttl}, #{lgnId}, #{pwd}, #{memo}, #{vltCatIdx}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_vlt_crd SET ttl = #{ttl}, lgn_id = #{lgnId}, pwd = #{pwd}, memo = #{memo}, vlt_cat_idx = #{vltCatIdx}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE tb_vlt_crd_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND created_by = #{createdBy} AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_vlt_crd SET del_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE tb_vlt_crd_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND created_by = #{createdBy} AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_vlt_crd SET vlt_cat_idx = NULL, updated_at = now() WHERE vlt_cat_idx = #{vltCatIdx} AND del_at IS NULL
